query:
SELECT 'contracts' as tbl, section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contracts GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'installments', section, COUNT(*) FROM installments GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payment_transactions', section, COUNT(*) FROM payment_transactions GROUP BY section
ORDER BY tbl, section;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute

UNION ALL

UNION ALL

ORDER BY tbl, section;
